snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 03 Ep 01 [Eng Sub] Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 12th Feb 21
snippet.description:
Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramasВ https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 03 - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her familyвҖҷs class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.

Though Mahi appreciates FarhadвҖҷs efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win MahiвҖҷs heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-struck souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?

Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher
Lyrics: Qamar Nashad
Composer: Naveed Nashad

Cast :

snippet.title: Groove Mera | HBL PSL Official Anthem 2021 | Naseebo Lal, Aima Baig & Young Stunners | #HBLPSL6
snippet.description:
Groove Mera | HBL PSL Official Anthem 2021 | Naseebo Lal, Aima Baig & Young Stunners | #HBLPSL6

Groove with us to the official HBL PSL 6 anthem as we celebrate the moments of finesse that one finds in the heart of every cricket match. 

This yearвҖҷs anthem also reflects the realities of COVID-19. As a number of fans will be watching PakistanвҖҷs biggest sporting event remotely, the anthem cheers on players on the field and their fans at home to celebrate their groove!

The anthem is a celebration of PakistanвҖҷs musical diversity as Naseebo Lal, Aima Baig and Young Stunners come together to sing the HBL PSL anthem for the first time ever. The mix of artists is particularly exciting as it represents artists from opposite ends of PakistanвҖҷs musical spectrum. The anthem brings together voices from PakistanвҖҷs rich musical landscape: regional folk and urban sounds of pop and hip-hop.

Music Produced by Xulfi
Agency: Giraffe Pakistan
Composed by Xulfi and Adnan Dhool
Lyrics: Adnan Dhool, Young Stunners (Talha Younus, Talha Anjum)
Associate Music Producer: Bilal Haider
Executive Producer: Muhammad Ibrahim
Operations Manager: Saad Mansoor
Vocals: Naseebo Lal, Aima Baig, Young Stunners 
Recorded and Mixed by Xulfi @ Xth Harmonic
Mastered by Chris Gehringer @ Sterling Sound, Edgewater NJ.
Production House: Seeme Production 
Executive Producer: Shehzad Ahmed 
Producer: Madiha Majeed 
Director: Fida Moin
DOP: Zain Haleem 
Post Producer: Faisal Shaikh 
Edit: Ahsan Raza 
Grade: Tahir Moosa 
Post and animation: Owais Roy, Post Island

snippet.title: Mission Valentine | Ashish Chanchlani
snippet.description:
Download the OctaFX Trading App at https://bit.ly/Chanchlani_OctaFX and get 5000 USD in your demo account рҹ’ө. Start making extra money with the "Best Forex Broker in India 2020" - OctaFXрҹҸҶрҹ“Ҳ

Aa gaya humara naya video
MISSION VALENTINE!
PURA VIDEO END TAK DEKHNA
Warna maza nai aaega
Bahut time baad tum sab seth logo ke lie ek one story video banayi
Haan maalum hai tum sabko laga 3rd part aaega valentine ka 
Lekin dekha humne kaise usko tease kiya video meinрҹҳү
Acha sachi bolta hu is video ke peeche 1 mahina lag gaya,from scripting to editing islie itna delay ho gaya video
Maafi seth log.
But maza aa gaya
Ye descrption main aaj subah ke 6 baje hagte hue likh raha hu socho kitni fatt gayiрҹҳӮ
Wo sab chodho ye humara pehla video hai jisme humne first time ek naye aspect ko introduce kiya aur normalize kiya
(Lekin DOKHA paap hai saalo yaad rakhna)
Abhi suno kasam se kehta hu is baar puri ki puri editing maine ki
Is baar video mein puri ki puri ACV team hai
Except Anmol
Except Grishim
Except Muski
Okay lol..
Is video mein kaafi naye chehre bhi dekhne mile honge jinhone bahut amazing performance diya
Introducing ACV team mein Bhavika Motwani as kaam-waali didi
Super talented Vivek Menon (@Watermenon Pictures ) apne beyounick ki team se (teesra hawaldar after kunal & tusharрҹҳӮ)
Aur to aur wo hotel waali ladki jo bhaag gayi Ritika bajaj
Baaki sab purane chawal hai ACV team ke likhte likhte thak jaunga
@Akash Dodeja as mc dost
@Kunal Chhabhria  as lavaris baap
@Simran Dhanwani meri valentine 
Manvita Chhabhria (kunal ki real life biwi aur meri reel life mummy)
@Rohit Sadhwani  as harami manager
@Ritesh Sadhwani  wo paneer-dudh waala 
@Tanish Sirwani  wo dank hotel guest
@Jashan Sirwani  wo hotel waala jo mam ke saath aaya tha
Akash jagtap wo acha desh ka nagrik jo buzurko ki madad karta hai (dont judge a book by its cover)
@Paras Rupani  as bhagoda boyfriend
Animesh Makhija wo nanga dodta hua guest (bhai ki body achi thi toh nanga scene kiya apne liyeрҹҷҢрҹҸ»)
Karan dhanwani rota hua aashiq (dhyaan se dekhna)
Camera @Siddharth Kedare  urf cinderella ne sambhala (shoot khatam hote hi bhaag jaata hai saala)
Lights aur production sirwani brothers ( mere mama ke ladke, aaj kal 50 r lete hai din ka)
Sound handling by ritesh wohi dudh waala
Ladka acha hai but jokes gande maarta hai
Wo hotel couple of wala scene ka idea was idea by Ashi chawla (idea ache deta hai par shooting se darta hai)
Baaki script writing & direction by your chanchuвқӨпёҸ
Seth log agar ye video pasand aayi toh please
Like chodh ke jaana
Mast comment karna favorite scene aur video apne committed (if they exist) as well as single ( matlab sab logрҹҳӮ)
ke saath share karna
Baaki toh tum seth log ko  maalum hai tumhara ashu tum acvians se kitna pyaar karta haiрҹҳҳ
#AshishChanchlani #MissionValentine #Acvians

Bus vich bethi sajji teeji seat te
Geet mera challe teri heartbeat te

Mere geet utte ne sharabi nachde
Khadki jande ne ni glass kach de
Khadke de vicho mennu saaj sunn de
Saaja' vicho' kann teri vaaj sunn de
Teri vaaj vicho' tera moonh dikhdai
Tere moonh nu dekh dekh Kaka geet likhdai

Likht meri de vich sift teri
Sift teri te ai grift meri
Teria grifta' ch Dil hai mera
Mere Dil vich ik Ghar hai tera
Tere ghar kol aakРө bus rukgi
Samjhi na ethe meri gall mukkgi
JithРө mukki otho' challugi repeat te
Ni teri haa' - naa da fark ni penda dheeth te
Bus vich bethi sajji teeji seat te
Geet mera challe teri heartbeat te....

Dhupp jado' tere chehre utte bethdi
Chehra tera janda meri rooh ch bethda
Rooh meri bethi tereya' khyala' ch
Tera ta' vajood lgge khooh ch bethda
Khooh ton bahar aaja jaane meriye
Aaja daryava' di krava' sair ni
Drya ton ocean da raah puchh k
Galla' kr beach te dubo k pair ni
Pair tere chhoon giya' lehra' aan k
Lehra' vich Sooraj dubbuga Jaan k
Dubbde ton chadh-de tyi' gall krange
Gall uljhake aape hall krange
Hall hoi gall te charha dyi' phull ni

Mere likhe geeta' nu chhuha dyi bullh ni
Tere bulla' te smile jiyu masala meat te
Ni tere Naina vicho' 2 peg laune neat de
Bus vich bethi sajji teeji seat te
Geet mera challe teri te

snippet.title: Mystery Of The Infants | C.I.D | аӨёаҘҖаӨҶаӨҲаӨЎаҘҖ | Real Heroes
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to LIV Crime: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzXpAx4v6rFLYXkJZ5nmSvQ?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of real heroes: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL0y08jtgaKIVIYFOZ8qi-3qMLgI8sKQmY

Many people in a society chase a man. The man then goes inside one of the houses and picks up a baby. When the people get their hands on the man, they start hitting him. Two women identify the baby and Bhavish and Jyoti's daughter. When they go to their house, they are shocked to find both of them dead and the CID team is approached for further investigation. Who killed the couple? Watch this episode to find out.

About CID:
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues

snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Episode 02 Teaser - 12th February 2021 - HAR PAL GEO
snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Episode 02 Teaser - 12th February 2021 - HAR PAL GEO

Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her familyвҖҷs class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.
Though Mahi appreciates FarhadвҖҷs efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win MahiвҖҷs heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-struck souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?
Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher
Lyrics: Qamar Nashad
Composer: Naveed Nashad

Cast :
Iqra Aziz As Mahi
Feroz Khan As Farhad
Rubina Ashraf As Bari Sarkar
Hina Bayat As Maa Ji
Junaid Khan As Sikandar
Mirza Zain Baig As Taimoor
Usman Peerzada As Kazim
Javed Shaikh As Nisar
Seemi Pasha As NisarвҖҷs Wife
Asma Abbas As FarhadвҖҷs Mother
Waseem Abbas As Taufeeq Ahmed
Sunita Marshal As Sahiba
Tooba Siddique As Romana
Sohail Sameer As Nazim
Meherbano As Rida
Shameen Khan As Sajjal

snippet.title: Fitoor - Episode 09 Teaser - 11th February 2021 - HAR PAL GEO
snippet.description:
Fitoor - Episode 09 Teaser - 11th February 2021 - HAR PAL GEO

Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Fitoor narrates a love story that transcends above all as a person in love is bound to forget about the worries of the past and the uncertainty of the future.
Despite being a successful architect, Haider feels lacking in his love life as he is still living with the memories of his love interest. On the other hand, Dilnasheen who hails from a middle-class background is deeply in love with her best friend's brother Hamza and both vows to be with each other forever without realizing the difficulties they might have to overcome. Living in her present, DilnasheenпҝҪs life takes an unfortunate turn when she crosses paths with Haider. Will Haider and Dilnasheen be able to forget their past and move on in their lives? Or will the past pay them a visit when they begin to settle down? Will Haider and Dilnasheen be able to distinguish between their past and present?

Written By: Zanjabeel Asim
Directed By: Siraj ul Haq
Produced By: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment

Cast :
Faysal Quraishi
Hiba Bukhari

snippet.title: CHAKRA KA RAHASYA Released Hindi Dubbed Movie | Naga Shaurya New Hindi Dubbed Movie |Mehreen Pirzada
snippet.description:
Gana (Naga Shaurya) returns to India for his sister Priya's (Sargun Kaur Luthra) marriage but is shocked to see her trying to commit suicide one night, and is shocked to learn she is pregnant but does not know who impregnated her. Gana explains this to her fiancГ© Ravi (Prince Cecil) who understands the situation, helps Priya get aborted, and promises to keep this a secret. Gana further convinces Priya to move on and forget about the past, which she does and happily gets married. After her marriage, Gana violently fights and interrogates men who troubled Priya in the past, only to learn none of them are behind her impregnation. Soon, another mysteriously impregnated woman named Sadhana commits suicide, and Gana reads her suicide letter explaining she didn't know how she got pregnant without her knowledge. Gana meets her parents and discovers her hospital reports according to which she fainted 3 months ago and was admitted by someone. Realizing Priya also fainted and was admitted, Gana goes to the hospital and finds out Sadhana was admitted in an emergency by an ambulance. He then learns that more girls named Lakshmi and Monica were also admitted by a similar ambulance.

The next day, Gana's girlfriend Neha (Mehreen Pirzada) informs him about her friend who fainted in the mall and was taken in an ambulance that hasn't arrived at the hospital yet. Gana rushes to the hospital and with help from the technical department, chases after the ambulances equipped with trackers. He stops many ambulances but doesn't find Neha's friend inside. Soon, he reaches a dead end and abandons his bike. Using his parkour skills, he chases after an ambulance, only to find him looking at another one that isn't being tracked. He ambushes the ambulance, fights off the men inside, and rescues Neha's friend. On the other hand, a psychopathic pathologist named Dr. Manoj Kumar (Jisshu Sengupta) is revealed to be the mastermind behind the pregnant girls, who then eliminates the fishermen. Later, Neha questions Gana's recent attitude towards her, forcing him to reveal his mission and what happened to Priya. Soon, a minister's daughter named Sowmya is killed and her corpse is dropped in front of the police station. With Neha's help, Gana manages to access Sowmya's laptop and receives photos where he spots an old man, Manoj's grandfather. Further, Gana manages to access CCTV footage of Sowmya buying a perfume from a vendor who reveals the old man told him to sell the perfumes and paid him for it. Since Sowmya was a drug addict, she wasn't unconscious despite being subject to anesthesia and thus knew about Manoj. Despite his friend's insistence not to do so, Manoj ended up killing her. Back to the present, the cops ask Manoj to perform an autopsy on Sowmya.

Gana then explains to Neha that all the victims, though unrelated, were admitted to hospital because of Hypoglycemia induced artificially by a banned drug called Hypomacene. Gana later visits the mall to view surveillance footage and discovers an address that leads him to Manoj's house. Having seen him talk about the autopsy on TV, Gana asks him for help with the case while Manoj tells him to wait for coffee. Manoj explains to his friend that he'd kill Gana, but receiving a call from Neha about the old man dumping another corpse in front of the police station, Gana secretly runs away. A car chase ensues, resulting in the old man's death after Manoj drops a cargo container on his car. Gana then goes to Manoj's house where he discovers dead bodies in separate vessels before Manoj arrives there with his friend. Manoj's friend, who turns out to be his father, removes his belt and starts beating him. It is then revealed that Manoj was psychopathic as a kid and even killed his father who since then appeared as a hallucination. Back to the present,Gana fights with Manoj and beats his head with a glass bottle. He throws him to a wardrobe and Gana drops a chandelier over him. Manoj is laughing, but when he sees his death weapon coming towards him , he faints. The chandelier falls over Manoj killing him. He then receives a call from his father who pranks him into believing a man is trying to harass Priya. Gana arrives home, and finds out Priya is now happily pregnant with Ravi's child

For More Hindi Dubbed Movies :-
Chanakya Full Movie - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RX4k1BQFS3c&t=110s
Damayanthi Full Movie - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=I_yhiZvEdUY&t=116s
Chalo (Nagashaurya) Full Movie - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=y5CJhgYf-Hc&t=149s
RX 100 Full Movie - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_O_rAmKP-KY

snippet.title: 3D PEN VS GLUE GUN! 17 Cool Hacks And Crafts For You
snippet.description:
WeвҖҷve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and hereвҖҷs what we created. ArenвҖҷt 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, letвҖҷs try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts youвҖҷll adore.

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isnвҖҷt an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyoneвҖҷs favorite activity, but it can be very messy вҖ” and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little oneвҖҷs outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day wonвҖҷt take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps: 

0:31 вҖ” The pacifier hack 

2:42 вҖ” A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 вҖ” The getting along/best friendsвҖҷ shirt 

7:20 вҖ” Face mask too big? Try this hack 

8:58 вҖ” Tasty gummy bear lollies

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure SupermanвҖҷs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

snippet.title: Roohi - Official Trailer | Rajkummar Janhvi  Varun | Dinesh Vijan | Mrighdeep Lamba | Hardik Mehta
snippet.description:
From the makers of Stree comes another horror comedy. Iss baar mard ko jyada dard hoga!

Roohi is set in a fictional town of North India. The film revolves around two small-town boys Bhaura and Kattanni who are stuck in a forest with Roohi. But thereвҖҷs an insidious spirit following them with feet turned backwards. What will happen next? Watch the trailer to know more.

Roohi releases in cinemas on 11th March 2021. A Jio Studios Worldwide release. 

Featuring: Rajkummar Rao, Janhvi Kapoor, Varun Sharma
Directed by: Hardik Mehta
Produced by: Dinesh Vijan & Mrighdeep Singh Lamba
Music by: Sachin-Jigar 

Social Media Links 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/maddockfilms/вҖӢ 
Twitter: https://twitter.com/MaddockFilmsвҖӢ
Instagram: https://instagram.com/maddockfilms

#RajkummarRao #JanhviKapoor #VarunSharma #Roohi

аӨ®аӨ®аҘҚаӨ® аӨҡаҘүаӨ•аӨІаҘҮаӨҹ, аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨӘаӨёаӨӮаӨҰаҘҖаӨҰаӨҫ, аӨҮаӨӨаӨЁаҘҖ аӨёаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨҰаӨҝаӨ·аҘҚаӨҹ! аӨҜаӨҰаӨҝ аӨӨаҘҒаӨ® аӨӯаҘӮаӨІ аӨ—аӨҜаҘҖ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨӨаҘӢ ,аӨӨаҘҒаӨ® аӨ…аӨ•аҘҮаӨІаҘҖ  аӨЁаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨ№аҘӢ , аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ! аӨ“аӨ№ аӨёаӨҡ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ? аӨҮаӨёаҘҮ аӨІаҘӢ! аӨҶаӨ№аҘҚаӨ№, аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ ???? аӨҶаӨӘ аӨҡаҘүаӨ•аӨІаҘҮаӨҹ аӨёаӨ№аҘҖ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨӨаҘҮ аӨҘаҘҮ? аӨӨаҘҒаӨ® аӨ¬аӨё аӨёаҘӮаӨёаҘҖ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨҮаӨӮаӨӨаӨңаӨҫаӨ° аӨ•аӨ°аҘӢ, аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮ аӨӨаҘҒаӨ®аҘҚаӨ№аҘҮаӨӮ аӨөаӨҫаӨӘаӨё аӨІаӨҫаӨҠаӨӮаӨ—аӨҫ! аӨҶаӨҮаӨҸ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨҶаӨӘ аӨҮаӨё аӨҡаҘүаӨ•аӨІаҘҮаӨҹ аӨҡаҘҲаӨІаҘҮаӨӮаӨң аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ•аӨҝаӨё аӨӨаӨ°аӨ№ аӨёаҘҮ аӨүаӨҡаӨҝаӨӨ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ, аӨ®аҘҲаӨӮаӨЁаҘҮ аӨҮаӨёаӨ•аҘҖ аӨөаҘҚаӨҜаӨөаӨёаҘҚаӨҘаӨҫ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ!

аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ аӨҶаӨӘаӨ•аҘӢ аӨҸаӨ• аӨҜаӨҫ аӨүаӨёаӨёаҘҮ аӨңаӨјаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨҫ аӨ«аӨҫаӨҜаӨҰаҘҮаӨ®аӨӮаӨҰ аӨІаӨ—аҘҮ аӨҜаҘҮ аӨ¬аӨ№аҘҒаӨӨ аӨ¬аӨўаӨјаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨӯаӨҫаӨЎаӨјаҘҮ? аӨҜаӨҫаӨҰ аӨёаҘҮ аӨҮаӨё аӨ§аӨЁ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҰаҘӢаӨёаҘҚаӨӨаҘӢаӨӮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨӮаӨҹаҘҮаӨӮ аӨҮаӨё аӨөаҘҖаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¶аҘҮаӨҜаӨ° аӨ•аӨ° аӨ•аҘҮ! аӨ”аӨ° аӨҗаӨёаҘҮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ«аӨҫаӨҜаӨҰаҘҮаӨ®аӨӮаӨҰ аӨ№аҘҲаӨ•аҘҚаӨё аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨҜаҘӮ аӨҹаҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨ¬  аӨҡаҘҲаӨЁаӨІ Multi DO аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаӨ¬аҘҚаӨёаӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨҮаӨ¬ аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаӨҫ аӨЁаӨҫ аӨӯаҘӮаӨІаҘҮаӨӮ!


#funny #MultiDO #DIY

в—Ҹв—Ҹ MANQABAT LYRICS в—Ҹ в—Ҹ 


Ba Mansha e Rab e Jahan Khenchtey Hain
Ali Sarhad e Kun FukaaвҖҷn Khenchtey Hain

Woh Daikho Palat ta Hai Maghrib Se Suraj
Ali Waqt Ki Doriyan Khenchtey Hain

Hai Jis Hath Main Murtaza Ki Sawari
Usi Se Abuzar Jahan Khenchtey Hain

Yeh Ale Muhammad Hain Ale Muhammad
Jo SajdonвҖҷn Say Haq Kay Nishaan Khenchtey Hain

Likho Nooh Tum Panch Isme Ilahi
Farishtey Abhi BadBaaвҖҷn Khenchtey Hain

Pisar Mang Rahib Yeh Daite Rahaingain
Sakhi Hath Apna Kahan Khenchtey Hain

Qayamat Main Daikha Qayamat Ka Manzar
Muqasir Ki Mesum ZabaвҖҷn Khenchtey Hain

Yeh SajdoвҖҷn Main Sher e Khuda Ki Kashish Hai
MakaaвҖҷn Sey Suwe La MakaaвҖҷn Khenchtey Hain

Yah Khaki  Bashar Farsh e Aza Bicha Kar
Zameen Ki Taraf Asmaan Khenchtey Hain

Nuseri Muqasir Rahai Apni Had Main
Woh Mola Ko Kyun Darmiyaan Khenchtey Hain

Takallum Khuda e Sukhan kay Kalam Say
JabeeвҖҷn e Imam e Zamaan Khenchtey Hain

snippet.title: Kaabil Full Hindi Movie | Hritik Roshan & Yami Gautam New Bollywood HD Movies 2021 | New Hindi Films
snippet.description:
Kaabil (transl.вҖүCapable) is a 2017 Indian Hindi-language action thriller film[7][8] directed by Sanjay Gupta, written by Vijay Kumar Mishra, produced by Rakesh Roshan under his banner FilmKraft Productions.[9] It stars Hrithik Roshan, Yami Gautam, Ronit Roy and Rohit Roy. The music was composed by Rajesh Roshan. Principal photography of the film began on 30 March 2016.[10]

The film follows a blind voiceover artist who becomes disillusioned when his wife is raped and the perpetrators walk free. He becomes a vigilante and decides to seek revenge against those responsible for his wife's death, while also dodging police with a cover that no one would believe a blind man can kill someone.

Kaabil was released theatrically on 25 January 2017.[11][12] Roshan received the Nomination of Filmfare Award for Best Actor for his performance at the 63rd Filmfare Awards. In 2019, it was also released in China where it became commercially unsuccessful.[13]

localized.description:
Kaabil (transl.вҖүCapable) is a 2017 Indian Hindi-language action thriller film[7][8] directed by Sanjay Gupta, written by Vijay Kumar Mishra, produced by Rakesh Roshan under his banner FilmKraft Productions.[9] It stars Hrithik Roshan, Yami Gautam, Ronit Roy and Rohit Roy. The music was composed by Rajesh Roshan. Principal photography of the film began on 30 March 2016.[10]

The film follows a blind voiceover artist who becomes disillusioned when his wife is raped and the perpetrators walk free. He becomes a vigilante and decides to seek revenge against those responsible for his wife's death, while also dodging police with a cover that no one would believe a blind man can kill someone.

Kaabil was released theatrically on 25 January 2017.[11][12] Roshan received the Nomination of Filmfare Award for Best Actor for his performance at the 63rd Filmfare Awards. In 2019, it was also released in China where it became commercially unsuccessful.[13]

snippet.title: Khoobsurat Itni Moti Kaisay Hogai - Nabeel | Bulbulay
snippet.description:

snippet.title: Press Release No 24/2021, Pak Conducted Successful Launch of Babur Cruise Missile -11 Feb 2021(ISPR)
snippet.description:
ISPR 
Pakistan today conducted a successful Training Launch of Babur Cruise Missile IA, with a range of 450 kilometers. Babur Cruise Missile is capable of engaging targets at Land and Sea with high precision. The missile was launched from a state of the art Multi Tube Missile Launch Vehicle. 
 The Training Launch was witnessed by Dr Raza Samar, Chairman NESCOM, Lieutenant General Muhammad Ali, Commander Army Strategic Forces Command, senior officers of Strategic Plans Division, Army Strategic Forces Command, Scientists and Engineers of the strategic organizations.
 Chairman NESCOM appreciated the standard of training and operational preparedness of Army Strategic Forces, which was reflected by the proficient handling of the Weapon System in the field and fulfillment of all laid down training parameters. He also appreciated the contributions of scientists and engineers towards enhancement of PakistanвҖҷs strategic capability.   
 The President, Prime Minister of Pakistan, Chairman Joint Chiefs of Staff Committee and Services Chiefs have also congratulated the participating troops on conduct of successful training launch.

snippet.title: Raqs-e-Bismil | Episode 7 | HUM TV Drama | 5 Feb 2021
snippet.description:
Raqs-e-Bismil, Episode 7, Official HD Video - 5 February 2021

Written by Hashim Nadeem, "Raqs-e-Bismil" marks the television return of ace director Wajahat Rauf and features the versatile Imran Ashraf in yet another distinct avatar opposite the uber talented Sarah Khan. Produced jointly by Shazia Wajahat and MD Productions, "Raqs-e-Bismil" is an unconventional take on love and passion. The story of the play revolves around two characters from contrasting worlds and ideologies and their understandings of love, life and relations. Apart from offering an exciting lead pair, the serial boasts a stellar supporting cast such as Mehmood Aslam, Nida Mumtaz, Anoushay Abbasi, Momin Saqib, Javeria Abbasi, Gul E Rana, Saleem Mairaj, Rashid Farooqui, Furqan Qureshi, Sajid Shah, Shazia Qaiser and others, and also marks the television debut of Lollywood diva Zara Sheikh. 

Staring: 
Imran Ashraf, Sarah Khan, Mehmood Aslam, Nida Mumtaz, Anoushay Abbasi, Momin Saqib, Javeria Abbasi, Gul E Rana, Saleem Mairaj, Rashid Farooqui, Mohammad Faisal Imran, Zara Shaikh, Azeem Sajjad, Furqan Qureshi, Sajid Shah, Shazia Qaiser, Farah Nadir, Tahir Jatoi, Shahzad Mukhtar, Faria Hassan, Benazir Khan, Taha Humayun, Abu Rohan, Umer Alam, Farrukh Darbaar & Others.

Written by: Hashim Nadeem

Directed by: Wajahat Raufп»ҝ

#RaqseBismil #HUMTV #ImranAshraf #SarahKhan #MahmoodAslam #ZaraSheikh #AnousheyAbbassi #MDProductions

snippet.title: Crime Patrol - Niana Bhabhi - Full Episode | Crime Stories | аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨҮаӨ® аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘӢаӨ°аҘҖаӨңаӨј
snippet.description:
Crime Patrol - Niana Bhabhi - Full Episode | Crime Stories | аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨҮаӨ® аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘӢаӨ°аҘҖаӨңаӨј | 

Presented by: DMR Entertainment
Story: Rupali Rawat
DOP: Ramesh Yadav
Makeup and Hair: Sazid Shaikh and Shradha
Sound Recordist: Manoj Gupta
Costume Stylist: Rupali Rawat
Background Music: Sunil Darnal
Editor: Rajiv Kumar Chanai
Creative Director: Arya Rawat
Director: Yatindra Rawat
Producer: Dharmanand Joshi, Raghu


Relive the best episodes of your favorite crime-thriller show, Crime Patrol, Crime Series, Crime Stories, Crime Alert, Crime TIme

About the show:
--------------------------
Crimes that tell us, we need to be careful, we need to be watchful. Crimes that tell us lives could have been saved. Every crime we hear of, either warns us to be careful or scares us, it could happen to us. Every crime ignites a feeling, 'It should not have happened'. Would knowing the 'Why' behind a crime, help in stopping a crime from happening?' I donвҖҷt like the way he looks at me', 'I donвҖҷt like the way he/she is behaving', 'I think he/she is out of his/her mind', 'I think he/she has gone crazy'. That gaze, that quirky smile, that persistent stare which unnerves. It is difficult to understand the intentions but the hints are there. In a house a husband and wife argue, fight. A vessel comes flying, a glass breaks. The husband is angry and the wife is upset. That hatred, that ego. The distance that keeps growing. It is difficult to comprehend the damage, but the cracks are there. FeelingsвҖҰ expressions. Misunderstood, unresolved callings of the heart. The cracks are there. Too wide to be missed. Yet when the heart takes over the mind, the outcome is a mindless tragedy. Crime Patrol- Dastak will attempt to look at the signs, the signals that are always there before these mindless crimes are committed. Instincts/Feelings/Signals that so often tell us that not everything is normal. Maybe, that signal/feeling/instinct is just not enough to believe it could result in a crime. Unfortunately, after the crime is committed, those same signals come haunting.


Disclaimer:
This program is entirely a work of fiction and a product of imagination. All events, incidences, characters and story of all the program are entirely fictitious and bear no resemblance to any person living or dead.

Producer: Dharmanand Joshi, Raghu


Relive the best episodes of your favorite crime-thriller show, Crime Patrol, Crime Series, Crime Stories, Crime Alert, Crime TIme

About the show:
--------------------------
Crimes that tell us, we need to be careful, we need to be watchful. Crimes that tell us lives could have been saved. Every crime we hear of, either warns us to be careful or scares us, it could happen to us. Every crime ignites a feeling, 'It should not have happened'. Would knowing the 'Why' behind a crime, help in stopping a crime from happening?' I donвҖҷt like the way he looks at me', 'I donвҖҷt like the way he/she is behaving', 'I think he/she is out of his/her mind', 'I think he/she has gone crazy'. That gaze, that quirky smile, that persistent stare which unnerves. It is difficult to understand the intentions but the hints are there. In a house a husband and wife argue, fight. A vessel comes flying, a glass breaks. The husband is angry and the wife is upset. That hatred, that ego. The distance that keeps growing. It is difficult to comprehend the damage, but the cracks are there. FeelingsвҖҰ expressions. Misunderstood, unresolved callings of the heart. The cracks are there. Too wide to be missed. Yet when the heart takes over the mind, the outcome is a mindless tragedy. Crime Patrol- Dastak will attempt to look at the signs, the signals that are always there before these mindless crimes are committed. Instincts/Feelings/Signals that so often tell us that not everything is normal. Maybe, that signal/feeling/instinct is just not enough to believe it could result in a crime. Unfortunately, after the crime is committed, those same signals come haunting.


Disclaimer:
This program is entirely a work of fiction and a product of imagination. All events, incidences, characters and story of all the program are entirely fictitious and bear no resemblance to any person living or dead.

Dibentangkan oleh: DMR Entertainment

Pengarah: Yatindra Rawat
Penerbit: Dharmanand Joshi, Raghu


Nikmati episod terbaik pertunjukan thriller jenayah kegemaran anda, Crime Patrol, Crime Series, Crime Stories, Crime Alert, Crime TIme

Mengenai rancangan:
--------------------------
Kejahatan yang memberitahu kita, kita perlu berhati-hati, kita perlu berwaspada. Jenayah yang memberitahu kita nyawa dapat diselamatkan. Setiap kejahatan yang kita dengar, baik memperingatkan kita untuk berhati-hati atau menakutkan kita, itu boleh berlaku pada kita. Setiap kejahatan membakar perasaan, 'Tidak seharusnya berlaku'. Adakah tahu 'mengapa' di sebalik kejahatan, membantu menghentikan jenayah daripada berlaku? ' Saya tidak suka cara dia memandang saya ',' Saya tidak suka dengan tingkah lakunya ',' Saya rasa dia sudah tidak waras ',' Saya rasa dia menjadi gila '. Pandangan itu, senyuman pelik, tatapan berterusan yang tidak perlu. Sukar untuk memahami niat tetapi petunjuknya ada. Di sebuah rumah suami isteri berdebat, bertengkar. Sebuah kapal datang terbang, kaca pecah. Suami marah dan isteri marah. Kebencian itu, ego itu. Jarak yang terus bertambah. Sukar untuk memahami kerosakan, tetapi celah-celah itu ada. Perasaan ... ungkapan. Salah faham, panggilan hati yang tidak pasti. Retakan ada. Terlalu luas untuk dilewatkan. Namun ketika hati mengambil alih fikiran, hasilnya adalah tragedi tanpa akal. Crime Patrol- Dastak akan berusaha melihat tanda-tanda, isyarat yang selalu ada sebelum jenayah tanpa akal ini dilakukan. Naluri / Perasaan / Isyarat yang sering memberitahu kita bahawa tidak semuanya normal. Mungkin, isyarat / perasaan / naluri itu tidak cukup untuk mempercayai ia boleh mengakibatkan kejahatan. Malangnya, setelah jenayah itu dilakukan, isyarat yang sama akan menghantui.


Penafian:
Program ini sepenuhnya merupakan karya fiksyen dan hasil imaginasi. Semua peristiwa, kejadian, watak dan kisah semua program adalah rekaan sepenuhnya dan tidak menyerupai mana-mana orang yang hidup atau mati.

Ш¬ШұЩ…ЩҲЩҶЩҮ ЪҶЫҗ Щ…ЩҲЪ– ШӘЩҮ ЩҲШ§ЫҢЫҢ ШҢ Щ…ЩҲЪ– ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ Щ…ШӯШӘШ§Ш· ЩҲШ§ЩҲШіЩҲ ШҢ Щ…ЩҲЪ– ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ Щ…ШӯШӘШ§Ш· ЩҫШ§ШӘЫҗ ШҙЩҲ. ЩҮШәЩҮ Ш¬ЩҶШ§ЫҢШӘЩҲЩҶЩҮ ЪҶЫҗ Щ…ЩҲЪ– ШӘЩҮ ЪҳЩҲЩҶШҜ ШұШ§Ъ©ЩҲЩҠ Щ…Щ…Ъ©ЩҶ ЩҲЪҳШәЩҲШұЩ„ ШҙЩҠ. ЩҮШұ Ш¬ЩҶШ§ЫҢШӘ ЪҶЫҗ Щ…ЩҲЪ– ЫҢЫҗ ЩҲШ§ЩҲШұЩҲ ШҢ ЫҢШ§ ЫҢЫҗ Щ…ЩҲЪ– ШӘЩҮ Ш®ШЁШұШҜШ§ШұЫҢ ШұШ§ Ъ©ЩҲЩҠ ЫҢШ§ ЪүШ§ШұЩҲЩҠ ШҢ ШҜШ§ ШІЩ…ЩҲЪ– ШіШұЩҮ ЩҫЫҢЪҡ Ъ©ЫҢШҜЫҢ ШҙЩҠ. ЩҮШұ Ш¬ШұЩ… ЫҢЩҲ Ш§ШӯШіШ§Ші ШұШ§ЩҫШ§ШұЩҲЩҠ ШҢ 'ШҜШ§ ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ ЩҫЫҢЪҡ ШҙЩҲЩҠ ЩҶЩҮ ЩҲЫҢ'. Ш§ЫҢШ§ ШҜ Ш¬ЩҶШ§ЫҢШӘ ШӘШұ ШҙШ§ ШҜ "ЩҲЩ„Ыҗ" ЩҫЩҮ ЩҫЫҢЪҳЩҶШҜЩ„ЩҲ ШЁЩҮ ШҜ Ш¬ШұЩ… Щ„ЩҮ ЩҫЫҢЪҡЫҢШҜЩҲ Ъ…Ш®ЩҮ ЩҫЩҮ Щ…Ш®ЩҶЫҢЩҲЩҠ Ъ©Ыҗ Щ…ШұШіШӘЩҮ ЩҲЪ©Ъ“ЩҠШҹ ШІЩҮ ЩҮШәЩҮ Щ„Ш§ШұЩҮ ЩҶЩҮ Ш®ЩҲЪҡЩҲЩ… ЪҶЫҗ ЩҮШәЩҮ Щ…Ш§ШӘЩҮ Ъ«ЩҲШұЩҠ '' ШҢ 'ШІЩҮ ЩҮШәЩҮ Ш·ШұЫҢЩӮЩҮ ЩҶЩҮ Ш®ЩҲЪҡЩҲЩ… ЪҶЫҗ ЩҮШәЩҮ / ЩҮШәЩҮ ШіЩ„ЩҲЪ© Ъ©ЩҲЩҠ' ШҢ 'ШІЩ…Ш§ ЩҫЩҮ Ш§ЩҶШҜ ЩҮШәЩҮ / ЩҮШәЩҮ ШҜ ЩҮШәЫҗ Щ„ЩҮ Ш°ЩҮЩҶ Ъ…Ш®ЩҮ ШЁЩҮШұ ШҜЩҮ' ШҢ "ШІЩ…Ш§ ЩҫЩҮ Ш§ЩҶШҜ ЩҮШәЩҮ / ЩҮШәЫҗ Щ„ШұЩҠ Щ„ЫҢЩҲЩҶЫҢ ШҙЩҲ '. ШҜШ§ ШіШӘШұЪ«Ыҗ ШҢ ШҜШ§ Ш№Ш¬ШЁЩҮ Щ…ШіЪ©Ш§ ШҢ ШҜШ§ ШҜЩҲШ§Щ…ШҜШ§ШұЩҮ Ъ«Ъ“ЩҶШҜЫҢ ЪҶЫҗ ЩҶЩҮ ЩҫЩҲЩҮЫҢЪ–ЩҠ. ШҜ Ш§ШұШ§ШҜЫҗ ЩҫЩҲЩҮЩҮ Ъ©ЩҲЩ„ ШіШӘЩҲЩҶШІЩ…ЩҶ ШҜЩҠ Щ…Ъ«Шұ Ш§ШҙШ§ШұЫҗ ЫҢЫҗ ШҙШӘЩҲЩҶ Щ„ШұЩҠ. ЩҫЩҮ ЫҢЩҲЩҮ Ъ©ЩҲШұ Ъ©Ыҗ Щ…ЫҢЪ“ЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ Щ…ЫҢШұЩ…ЩҶ ШЁШӯШ« Ъ©ЩҲЩҠ ШҢ Ш¬Ъ«Ъ“ЩҮ Ъ©ЩҲЩҠ. ЫҢЩҲ Ъ©ЪҡШӘЫҚ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШӘЩҶЩҮ ШұШ§ЪҒЩҠ ШҢ ШҙЫҢШҙЩҮ Щ…Ш§ШӘЩҮ Ъ©ЫҢЪ–ЩҠ. Щ…ЫҢЪ“ЩҮ ЩҶШ§ШұШ§Ш¶ ШҜЫҢ Ш§ЩҲ ЪҡЪҒЩҮ Ш®ЩҫЩҮ ШҜЩҮ. ЩҮШәЩҮ ЩҶЩҒШұШӘ ШҢ ЩҮШәЩҮ Ш§ЩҶШ§. ЩҲШ§ЩјЩҶ ЪҶЫҗ ЩҲШҜЩҮ Ъ©ЩҲЩҠ. ШҜ ШІЫҢШ§ЩҶ ЩҫЫҢЪҳЩҶШҜЩ„ Щ…ШҙЪ©Щ„ ШҜЩҠ ШҢ Щ…Ъ«Шұ ШҜШұШІЩҲЩҶЩҮ ШҙШӘЩҲЩҶ Щ„ШұЩҠ. Ш§ШӯШіШ§ШіШ§ШӘ ... Ъ…ШұЪ«ЩҶШҜЩҲЩҶЫҗ. ШәЩ„Ш· ЩҫЩҲЩҮЫҢШҜЩ„ ШҢ ШҜ ШІЪ“ЩҮ ЩҶШ§Ъ…ШұЪ«ЩҶШҜЩҮ ШәЪ–ЩҲЩҶЩҮ. ШҜШұШІЩҲЩҶЩҮ ЩҮЩ„ШӘЩҮ ШҜЩҠ ЪүЫҢШұ ЩҮЫҢШұ ШҙЩҲЫҢ. Ъ©ЩҮ Ъ…ЩҮ ЩҮЩ… Ъ©Щ„ЩҮ ЪҶЫҗ ШІЪ“ЩҮ Щ„ЩҮ Ш°ЩҮЩҶ Ъ…Ш®ЩҮ Щ„Ш§Ші ЩҲШ§Ш®Щ„ЩҠ ШҢ ЩҫШ§ЫҢЩ„ЩҮ ЫҢЫҗ ШҜ ШЁЫҗ ЩҫШ§Щ…ЫҚ ШӘШұШ§ЪҳЫҢШҜЩҠ ШҜЩҮ. ШҜ Ш¬ШұЩ… Ъ«ШІЩ…ЩҮ - ЪүЫҢШіЪ© ШЁЩҮ ЩҶЪҡЩҲ ШӘЩҮ ШҜ Ъ©ШӘЩ„ЩҲ ЩҮЪ…ЩҮ ЩҲЪ©Ъ“ЩҠ ШҢ ЩҮШәЩҮ ЩҶЪҡЫҗ ЪҶЫҗ ШӘЩ„ ШҜ ШҜЫҗ ШЁЫҗ ЩҫШ§Щ…ЩҮ Ш¬ШұЩ…ЩҲЩҶЩҲ ШӘШұШіШұЩҮ Ъ©ЫҢШҜЩҲ ШҜЩ…Ш®ЩҮ ШҙШӘЩҲЩҶ Щ„ШұЩҠ. Ш§ШӯШіШ§ШіШ§ШӘ / Ш§ШӯШіШ§ШіШ§ШӘ / ШіЫҢЪ«ЩҶШ§Щ„ЩҲЩҶЩҮ ЪҶЫҗ Ъ…ЩҲ ЪҒЩ„ЩҮ Щ…ЩҲЪ– ШӘЩҮ ЩҲШ§ЩҠЩҠ ЪҶЫҗ ЩҮШұЪ…ЩҮ ЩҶЩҲШұЩ…Ш§Щ„ ЩҶШҜЩҠ. ШҙШ§ЫҢШҜ ШҢ ШҜШ§ ШіЫҢЪ«ЩҶШ§Щ„ / Ш§ШӯШіШ§Ші / Ш§ШӯШіШ§Ші ЫҢЩҲШ§ШІЫҗ ШҜЩҲЩ…ШұЩҮ ШЁШі ЩҶЩҮ ШҜЫҢ ЪҶЫҗ ШЁШ§ЩҲШұ ЩҲЪ©Ъ“ЩҠ ШҜШ§ Щ…Щ…Ъ©ЩҶ ШҜ Ш¬ШұЩ… Щ„Ш§Щ…Щ„ ШҙЩҠ. ШЁШҜШЁШ®ШӘШ§ЩҶЩҮ ШҢ ЩҲШұЩҲШіШӘЩҮ Щ„ЩҮ ЩҮШәЩҮ ЪҶЫҗ Ш¬ШұЩ… ШӘШұШіШұЩҮ ШҙЩҲ ШҢ ЩҶЩҲ ЩҲШұШӘЩҮ ЩҶЪҡЫҗ ЩҶЪҡШ§ЩҶЫҗ ЪҡЪ©Ш§ШұЩҠ.


Ш®ШЁШұШӘЫҢШ§:
ШҜШ§ ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҮ ЩҫЩҮ ШЁШҙЩҫЪ“ ЪүЩҲЩ„ ШҜ ШӘШ®ЫҢЩ„ Ъ©Ш§Шұ Ш§ЩҲ ШҜ ШӘШөЩҲШұ Щ…ШӯШөЩҲЩ„ ШҜЫҢ. ШҜ ЩјЩҲЩ„Ыҗ ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…Ыҗ ЩјЩҲЩ„Ыҗ ЩҫЫҢЪҡЫҗ ШҢ ЩҫЫҢЪҡЫҗ ШҢ Ъ©ШұЪ©ЩјШұЩҲЩҶЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ Ъ©ЫҢШіЫҗ ЩҫЩҮ ШЁШҙЩҫЪ“ ЪүЩҲЩ„ Ш¬Ш№Щ„ЩҠ ШҜЩҠ Ш§ЩҲ ШҜ Ъ©ЩҲЩ… ЪҳЩҲЩҶШҜЫҚ ЫҢШ§ Щ…Ъ“ЩҮ ШҙЩҲЩҠ Ш§ЩҶШіШ§ЩҶ ШіШұЩҮ ЩҮЫҢЪ… ЩҲШұШӘЩҮ ЩҲШ§Щ„ЫҢ ЩҶЩ„ШұЩҠ.

ШҜ ЩҶЩҲШұЩҲ Ш¬ШұЩ…ЩҲЩҶЩҲ Ъ©ЫҢШіЫҗ Щ„ЩҫШ§ШұЩҮ Ъ«ЪүЩҲЩҶ ЩҲЪ©Ъ“ШҰ iny tinyurl.com/yqr4dckv

# Ъ©ШұЫҢШіЩ…ШіЩјШұЫҢШІ # ЩҮЩҶШҜЫҢ ЪүШЁЪү Щ…ЩҲЩҲЫҢ # ШЁШ§Щ„ЫҢ ЩҲЩҲЪү Ш№ШұШЁЫҢ # Ъ©ШұЫҢЩҫЩјШұЩҲЩ„ # ЩҶЫҢЩҲЫҢШ§ШұЪ© ЩјШ§ЫҢЩ… # Ш§ЫҢЩҒ ЪүШЁЩ„ЫҢЩҲ Ш§ЫҢЩҒ Ш§ЩҒШұЫҢЪ«ЫҢЩҶШ§Щ„ШІ # Ъ©ШұЫҢШіЩ…ЩјШұЫҢ # ШіЫҢЪү # Ъ©ШұШ§ШҰЩ… # Ъ©ШұЫҢЪүЫҢ Ъ©ЫҢШіЫҗ

hi.title: Crime Patrol - Naina Bhabhi  - Full Episode  - Crime Stories - Love Story
hi.description:
Crime Patrol - Naina Bhabhi  - Full Episode  - Crime Stories - Love Story

Presented by: DMR Entertainment
Story: Rupali Rawat
DOP: Ramesh Yadav
Makeup and Hair: Sazid Shaikh and Shradha
Sound Recordist: Manoj Gupta
Costume Stylist: Rupali Rawat
Background Music: Sunil Darnal
Editor: Rajiv Kumar Chanai
Creative Director: Arya Rawat
Director: Yatindra Rawat
Producer: Dharmanand Joshi, Raghu


Relive the best episodes of your favorite crime-thriller show, Crime Patrol, Crime Series, Crime Stories, Crime Alert, Crime Time, Crime Story

About the show:
--------------------------
Crimes that tell us, we need to be careful, we need to be watchful. Crimes that tell us lives could have been saved. Every crime we hear of, either warns us to be careful or scares us, it could happen to us. Every crime ignites a feeling, 'It should not have happened'. Would knowing the 'Why' behind a crime, help in stopping a crime from happening?' I donвҖҷt like the way he looks at me', 'I donвҖҷt like the way he/she is behaving', 'I think he/she is out of his/her mind', 'I think he/she has gone crazy'. That gaze, that quirky smile, that persistent stare which unnerves. It is difficult to understand the intentions but the hints are there. In a house a husband and wife argue, fight. A vessel comes flying, a glass breaks. The husband is angry and the wife is upset. That hatred, that ego. The distance that keeps growing. It is difficult to comprehend the damage, but the cracks are there. FeelingsвҖҰ expressions. Misunderstood, unresolved callings of the heart. The cracks are there. Too wide to be missed. Yet when the heart takes over the mind, the outcome is a mindless tragedy. Crime Patrol- Dastak will attempt to look at the signs, the signals that are always there before these mindless crimes are committed. Instincts/Feelings/Signals that so often tell us that not everything is normal. Maybe, that signal/feeling/instinct is just not enough to believe it could result in a crime. Unfortunately, after the crime is committed, those same signals come haunting.


Disclaimer:
This program is entirely a work of fiction and a product of imagination. All events, incidences, characters and story of all the program are entirely fictitious and bear no resemblance to any person living or dead.

ta.title: а®•аҜҒа®ұаҜҚа®ұ а®°аҜӢа®ЁаҜҚа®ӨаҜҒ - а®Ёа®ҝа®Ҝа®ҫа®©а®ҫ а®Әа®ҫа®Әа®ҝ - а®®аҜҒа®ҙаҜҒ а®…а®ӨаҜҚа®Өа®ҝа®Ҝа®ҫа®Ҝа®®аҜҚ | а®•аҜҒа®ұаҜҚа®ұа®•аҜҚ а®•а®ӨаҜҲа®•а®іаҜҚ | а®•аҜҒа®ұаҜҚа®ұа®•аҜҚ а®•а®ӨаҜҲа®•а®іаҜҚ | ЩӮШөШө Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШұЩҠЩ…Ш©
ta.description:
а®•аҜҒа®ұаҜҚа®ұ а®°аҜӢа®ЁаҜҚа®ӨаҜҒ - а®Ёа®ҝа®Ҝа®ҫа®©а®ҫ а®Әа®ҫа®Әа®ҝ - а®®аҜҒа®ҙаҜҒ а®…а®ӨаҜҚа®Өа®ҝа®Ҝа®ҫа®Ҝа®®аҜҚ | а®•аҜҒа®ұаҜҚа®ұа®•аҜҚ а®•а®ӨаҜҲа®•а®іаҜҚ | а®•аҜҒа®ұаҜҚа®ұа®•аҜҚ а®•а®ӨаҜҲа®•а®іаҜҚ | ЩӮШөШө Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШұЩҠЩ…Ш©

а®өа®ҙа®ҷаҜҚа®•а®ҝа®Ҝа®өа®°аҜҚ: а®ҹа®ҝ.а®Һа®®аҜҚ.а®Ҷа®°аҜҚ а®Һа®©аҜҚа®ҹа®°аҜҚа®ҹаҜҶа®Ҝа®ҝа®©аҜҚа®®аҜҶа®©аҜҚа®ҹаҜҚ
а®•а®ӨаҜҲ: а®°аҜӮа®Әа®ҫа®Іа®ҝ а®°а®ҫа®өа®ӨаҜҚ
а®ҹа®ҫа®ӘаҜҚ: а®°а®®аҜҮа®·аҜҚ а®Ҝа®ҫа®Өа®өаҜҚ
а®’а®ӘаҜҚа®Әа®©аҜҲ а®®а®ұаҜҚа®ұаҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®®аҜҒа®ҹа®ҝ: а®ҡа®ҡа®ҝа®ӨаҜҚ а®·аҜҮа®•аҜҚ а®®а®ұаҜҚа®ұаҜҒа®®аҜҚ а®·аҜҚа®°а®Өа®ҫ
а®’а®Іа®ҝ а®°аҜҶа®•аҜҚа®•а®ҫа®°аҜҚа®ҹа®ҝа®ёаҜҚа®ҹаҜҚ: а®®а®©аҜӢа®ңаҜҚ а®•аҜҒа®ӘаҜҚа®Өа®ҫ
а®Ҷа®ҹаҜҲ а®’а®ӘаҜҚа®Әа®©аҜҲа®Ҝа®ҫа®іа®°аҜҚ: а®°аҜӮа®Әа®ҫа®Іа®ҝ а®°а®ҫа®өа®ӨаҜҚ
а®Әа®ҝа®©аҜҚа®©а®Ја®ҝ а®Үа®ҡаҜҲ: а®ҡаҜҒа®©а®ҝа®ІаҜҚ а®Өа®°аҜҚа®©а®ІаҜҚ

Crime Story that tell us, we need to be careful, we need to be watchful. Crimes that tell us lives could have been saved. Every crime we hear of, either warns us to be careful or scares us, it could happen to us. Every crime ignites a feeling, "It should not have happened". Would knowing the "Why" behind a crime, help in stopping a crime from happening?"I don't like the way he looks at me", "I don't like the way he/she is behaving", "I think he/she is out of his/her mind", "I think he/she has gone crazy". That gaze, that quirky smile, that persistent stare which unnerves. It is difficult to understand the intentions but the hints are there. In a house a husband and wife argue, fight. A vessel comes flying, a glass breaks. Husband is angry and the wife is upset. That hatred, that ego. The distance that keeps growing. It is difficult to comprehend the damage, but the cracks are there. Feelings... expressions. Misunderstood, unresolved callings of the heart. The cracks are there. Too wide to be missed. Yet when the heart takes over the mind, the outcome is a mindless tragedy.

ШҜШіШӘШЁШұШҜШ§ШұЫҢ:
ЫҢЫҒ ЩҫШұЩҲЪҜШұШ§Щ… Щ…Ъ©Щ…Щ„ Ш·ЩҲШұ ЩҫШұ ШӘШ®ЫҢЩ„ Ъ©Ш§ Ъ©Ш§Щ… ЫҒЫ’ Ш§ЩҲШұ ШӘШ®ЫҢЩ„ Ъ©ЫҢ ЩҫЫҢШҜШ§ЩҲШ§Шұ ЫҒЫ’Ы” ШӘЩ…Ш§Щ… ЩҫШұЩҲЪҜШұШ§Щ… Ъ©Ы’ ЩҲШ§ЩӮШ№Ш§ШӘ ШҢ ЩҲШ§ЩӮШ№Ш§ШӘ ШҢ Ъ©ШұШҜШ§Шұ Ш§ЩҲШұ Ъ©ЫҒШ§ЩҶЫҢ Щ…Ъ©Щ…Щ„ Ш·ЩҲШұ ЩҫШұ ШәЫҢШұ ШӯЩӮЫҢЩӮЫҢ ЫҒЫҢЪә Ш§ЩҲШұ Ъ©ШіЫҢ ШЁЪҫЫҢ ШІЩҶШҜЫҒ ЫҢШ§ Щ…ШұШҜЫҒ ШҙШ®Шө ШіЫ’ Ъ©ЩҲШҰЫҢ Щ…ШҙШ§ШЁЫҒШӘ ЩҶЫҒЫҢЪә ШұЪ©ЪҫШӘЫ’ ЫҒЫҢЪәЫ”

es.description:

Revive los mejores episodios de tu programa de suspenso y crimen favorito, Crime Patrol, Crime Series, Crime Stories, Crime Alert, Crime Time.

Sobre el programa:
--------------------------
CrГӯmenes que nos dicen, debemos tener cuidado, debemos estar atentos. CrГӯmenes que nos dicen que se podrГӯan haber salvado vidas. Cada crimen que escuchamos, o nos advierte que tengamos cuidado o nos asusta, nos podrГӯa pasar. Cada crimen enciende un sentimiento, 'No deberГӯa haber sucedido'. ВҝSabrГӯa el 'por quГ©' detrГЎs de un crimen, ayudarГӯa a evitar que ocurra un crimen? ' No me gusta la forma en que me mira ',' No me gusta la forma en que se estГЎ comportando ',' Creo que estГЎ loco ',' Creo que tiene volverse loco '. Esa mirada, esa sonrisa peculiar, esa mirada persistente que desconcierta. Es difГӯcil entender las intenciones, pero las pistas estГЎn ahГӯ. En una casa, marido y mujer discuten, pelean. Un barco viene volando, un vaso se rompe. El esposo estГЎ enojado y la esposa molesta. Ese odio, ese ego. La distancia que sigue creciendo. Es difГӯcil comprender el daГұo, pero las grietas estГЎn ahГӯ. Sentimientos ... expresiones. Llamados del corazГіn incomprendidos e inciertos. Las grietas estГЎn ahГӯ. Demasiado ancho para pasarlo por alto. Sin embargo, cuando el corazГіn se apodera de la mente, el resultado es una tragedia sin sentido. Crime Patrol- Dastak intentarГЎ mirar las seГұales, las seГұales que siempre estГЎn ahГӯ antes de que se cometan estos crГӯmenes sin sentido. Instintos / Sentimientos / SeГұales que tantas veces nos dicen que no todo es normal. Tal vez, esa seГұal / sentimiento / instinto no sea suficiente para creer que podrГӯa resultar en un crimen. Desafortunadamente, despuГ©s de que se comete el crimen, esas mismas seГұales son inquietantes.


Descargo de responsabilidad:
Este programa es completamente una obra de ficciГіn y un producto de la imaginaciГіn. Todos los eventos, incidencias, personajes e historia de todo el programa son completamente ficticios y no se parecen a ninguna persona viva o muerta.

Relive the best episodes of your favorite crime-thriller show, Crime Patrol, Crime Series, Crime Stories, Crime Alert, Crime TIme

About the show:
--------------------------
Crimes that tell us, we need to be careful, we need to be watchful. Crimes that tell us lives could have been saved. Every crime we hear of, either warns us to be careful or scares us, it could happen to us. Every crime ignites a feeling, 'It should not have happened'. Would knowing the 'Why' behind a crime, help in stopping a crime from happening?' I donвҖҷt like the way he looks at me', 'I donвҖҷt like the way he/she is behaving', 'I think he/she is out of his/her mind', 'I think he/she has gone crazy'. That gaze, that quirky smile, that persistent stare which unnerves. It is difficult to understand the intentions but the hints are there. In a house a husband and wife argue, fight. A vessel comes flying, a glass breaks. The husband is angry and the wife is upset. That hatred, that ego. The distance that keeps growing. It is difficult to comprehend the damage, but the cracks are there. FeelingsвҖҰ expressions. Misunderstood, unresolved callings of the heart. The cracks are there. Too wide to be missed. Yet when the heart takes over the mind, the outcome is a mindless tragedy. Crime Patrol- Dastak will attempt to look at the signs, the signals that are always there before these mindless crimes are committed. Instincts/Feelings/Signals that so often tell us that not everything is normal. Maybe, that signal/feeling/instinct is just not enough to believe it could result in a crime. Unfortunately, after the crime is committed, those same signals come haunting.


Disclaimer:
This program is entirely a work of fiction and a product of imagination. All events, incidences, characters and story of all the program are entirely fictitious and bear no resemblance to any person living or dead.

Щ…ШҜЫҢШұ Ш®Щ„Ш§ЩӮЫҢШӘ: ШўШұЫҢШ§ ШұШ§ЩҲШ§ШӘ
Ъ©Ш§ШұЪҜШұШҜШ§ЩҶ: Yatindra Rawat
ШӘЩҮЫҢЩҮ Ъ©ЩҶЩҶШҜЩҮ: ШҜШ§ШұЩ…Ш§ЩҶШҜ Ш¬ЩҲШҙЫҢ ШҢ ШұШ§ЪҜЩҲ


ШЁЩҮШӘШұЫҢЩҶ ЩӮШіЩ…ШӘ ЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢШҙ Щ…ЩҮЫҢШ¬ Ш¬ЩҶШ§ЫҢЫҢ ШҢ ЪҜШҙШӘ Ш¬ЩҶШ§ЫҢЫҢ ШҢ ШіШұЫҢШ§Щ„ ЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш¬ЩҶШ§ЫҢЫҢ ШҢ ШҜШ§ШіШӘШ§ЩҶ ЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш¬ЩҶШ§ЫҢЫҢ ШҢ ЩҮШҙШҜШ§Шұ Ш¬ЩҶШ§ЫҢЫҢ ШҢ Ш¬ШұЩ… ЩҲ Ш¬ЩҶШ§ЫҢШӘ ШұШ§ Ш§ШІ ШіШұ ЪҜШ°ШұШ§ЩҶЫҢШҜ

ШҜШұШЁШ§ШұЩҮ ЩҶЩ…Ш§ЫҢШҙ:
--------------------------
Ш¬ЩҶШ§ЫҢШ§ШӘЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁЩҮ Щ…Ш§ Щ…ЫҢ ЪҜЩҲЫҢЩҶШҜ ШҢ Щ…Ш§ ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ Щ…ШұШ§ЩӮШЁ ШЁШ§ШҙЫҢЩ… ШҢ ШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ Щ…ШұШ§ЩӮШЁ ШЁШ§ШҙЫҢЩ…. Ш¬ЩҶШ§ЫҢШ§ШӘЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁЩҮ Щ…Ш§ Щ…ЫҢ ЪҜЩҲЫҢЩҶШҜ Щ…ЫҢ ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶ ШІЩҶШҜЪҜЫҢ ШұШ§ ЩҶШ¬Ш§ШӘ ШҜШ§ШҜ. ЩҮШұ Ш¬ЩҶШ§ЫҢШӘЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ Щ…ЫҢ ШҙЩҶЩҲЫҢЩ… ШҢ ЫҢШ§ ШЁЩҮ Щ…Ш§ ЪҜЩҲШҙШІШҜ Щ…ЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶШҜ Ъ©ЩҮ Щ…ШұШ§ЩӮШЁ ШЁШ§ШҙЫҢЩ… ЫҢШ§ Щ…Ш§ ШұШ§ Щ…ЫҢ ШӘШұШіШ§ЩҶШҜ ШҢ Щ…Щ…Ъ©ЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘ ШЁШұШ§ЫҢ Щ…Ш§ Ш§ШӘЩҒШ§ЩӮ ШЁЫҢЩҒШӘШҜ. ЩҮШұ Ш¬ЩҶШ§ЫҢШӘЫҢ ШЁШ§Ш№Ш« Ш§ЫҢШ¬Ш§ШҜ Ш§ШӯШіШ§Ші Щ…ЫҢ ШҙЩҲШҜ ШҢ "ЩҶШЁШ§ЫҢШҜ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ Ш§ШӘЩҒШ§ЩӮ Щ…ЫҢ Ш§ЩҒШӘШ§ШҜ". ШўЫҢШ§ Щ…ЫҢ ШҜШ§ЩҶЫҢШҜ "ЪҶШұШ§" ШҜШұ ЩҫШҙШӘ ЫҢЪ© Ш¬ШұЩ… ШҢ ШЁЩҮ Ш¬Щ„ЩҲЪҜЫҢШұЫҢ Ш§ШІ ЩҲЩӮЩҲШ№ Ш¬ШұЩ… Ъ©Щ…Ъ© Щ…ЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶШҜШҹ " Щ…ЩҶ ЩҶЩҲШ№ ЩҶЪҜШ§ЩҮ Ш§ЩҲ ШұШ§ ШҜЩҲШіШӘ ЩҶШҜШ§ШұЩ… "ШҢ" Щ…ЩҶ ШұЩҒШӘШ§Шұ Ш§ЩҲ ШұШ§ ШҜЩҲШіШӘ ЩҶШҜШ§ШұЩ… "ШҢ" Щ…ЩҶ ЩҒЪ©Шұ Щ…ЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶЩ… Ш§ЩҲ Ш§ШІ Ш°ЩҮЩҶ Ш®ЩҲШҜ Ш®Ш§ШұШ¬ ШҙШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ "ШҢ" Щ…ЩҶ ЩҒЪ©Шұ Щ…ЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶЩ… Ш§ЩҲ ШҜЫҢЩҲШ§ЩҶЩҮ ШҙШҜЩҮ ШўЩҶ ЩҶЪҜШ§ЩҮ ШҢ ШўЩҶ Щ„ШЁШ®ЩҶШҜ ШҜЩ…ШҜЩ…ЫҢ Щ…ШІШ§Ш¬ ШҢ ЩҲ ШўЩҶ Ш®ЫҢШұЩҮ Щ…ШҜШ§ЩҲЩ… Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁЫҢ ШӯШіЫҢ Щ…ЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶШҜ. ШҜШұЪ© Ш§ЩҮШҜШ§ЩҒ ШҜШҙЩҲШ§Шұ Ш§ШіШӘ Ш§Щ…Ш§ ЩҶЪ©Ш§ШӘ Щ…ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜ ШҜШұ ШўЩҶ ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜ ШҜШ§ШұШҜ. ШҜШұ Ш®Ш§ЩҶЩҮ Ш§ЫҢ ШІЩҶ ЩҲ ШҙЩҲЩҮШұ ШЁШ§ ЩҮЩ… Щ…ШҙШ§Ш¬ШұЩҮ Щ…ЫҢ Ъ©ЩҶЩҶШҜ ШҢ ШҜШ№ЩҲШ§ Ъ©ЩҶЫҢШҜ. ЫҢЪ© Ъ©ШҙШӘЫҢ Щ…ЫҢ ШўЫҢШҜ ЩҫШұЩҲШ§ШІ ШҢ ЫҢЪ© Щ„ЫҢЩҲШ§ЩҶ Щ…ЫҢ ШҙЪ©ЩҶШҜ. ШҙЩҲЩҮШұ Ш№ШөШЁШ§ЩҶЫҢ Ш§ШіШӘ ЩҲ ШІЩҶ ЩҶШ§ШұШ§ШӯШӘ. ШўЩҶ ЩҶЩҒШұШӘ ШҢ ШўЩҶ Ш®ЩҲШҜШ®ЩҲШ§ЩҮЫҢ. ЩҒШ§ШөЩ„ЩҮ Ш§ЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ Щ…ШҜШ§Щ… ШҜШұ ШӯШ§Щ„ ШұШҙШҜ Ш§ШіШӘ. ШҜШұЪ© ШөШҜЩ…ЩҮ Ъ©Ш§Шұ ШҜШҙЩҲШ§ШұЫҢ Ш§ШіШӘ ШҢ Ш§Щ…Ш§ ШӘШұЪ© ЩҮШ§ ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜ ШҜШ§ШұШҜ. Ш§ШӯШіШ§ШіШ§ШӘвҖҰ Ш№ШЁШ§ШұШ§ШӘ. ЩҶШҜШ§ЩҮШ§ЫҢ ЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҒЩҮЩҲЩ… ЩӮЩ„ШЁ ШҢ ШӘШұЪ© ЩҮШ§ ШўЩҶШ¬Ш§ШіШӘ. Ш®ЫҢЩ„ЫҢ ЪҜШҙШ§ШҜ Ш§ШіШӘ ШЁШ§ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜ ЩҲЩӮШӘЫҢ ЩӮЩ„ШЁ Ш°ЩҮЩҶ ШұШ§ ШЁЩҮ ШҜШіШӘ Щ…ЫҢ ЪҜЫҢШұШҜ ШҢ ЩҶШӘЫҢШ¬ЩҮ ЫҢЪ© ЩҒШ§Ш¬Ш№ЩҮ ШЁЫҢ ЩҒЪ©Шұ Ш§ШіШӘ. ЪҜШҙШӘ Ш¬ЩҶШ§ЫҢЫҢ - ШҜШіШӘЪ© ШіШ№ЫҢ Ш®ЩҲШ§ЩҮШҜ Ъ©ШұШҜ ШЁЩҮ Ш№Щ„Ш§ШҰЩ… ШҢ ЩҶШҙШ§ЩҶЩҮ ЩҮШ§ЫҢЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ ЩҮЩ…ЫҢШҙЩҮ ЩӮШЁЩ„ Ш§ШІ Ш§ШұШӘЪ©Ш§ШЁ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ Ш¬ЩҶШ§ЫҢШ§ШӘ ШЁЫҢ ЩҒЪ©Шұ ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜ ШҜШ§ШұШҜ ШҢ ЩҶЪҜШ§ЩҮ Ъ©ЩҶШҜ. ШәШұШ§ЫҢШІ / Ш§ШӯШіШ§ШіШ§ШӘ / ШіЫҢЪҜЩҶШ§Щ„ ЩҮШ§ЫҢЫҢ Ъ©ЩҮ Ш§ШәЩ„ШЁ ШЁЩҮ Щ…Ш§ Щ…ЫҢ ЪҜЩҲЫҢЩҶШҜ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ ЪҶЫҢШІ Ш·ШЁЫҢШ№ЫҢ ЩҶЫҢШіШӘ. ШҙШ§ЫҢШҜ Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ШіЫҢЪҜЩҶШ§Щ„ / Ш§ШӯШіШ§Ші / ШәШұЫҢШІЩҮ ЩҒЩӮШ· Ъ©Ш§ЩҒЫҢ ЩҶШЁШ§ШҙШҜ Ъ©ЩҮ ШЁШӘЩҲШ§ЩҶШҜ Щ…ЩҶШ¬Шұ ШЁЩҮ Ш¬ШұЩ… ШҙЩҲШҜ. Щ…ШӘШЈШіЩҒШ§ЩҶЩҮ ШҢ ЩҫШі Ш§ШІ Ш§ШұШӘЪ©Ш§ШЁ Ш¬ШұЩ… ШҢ ЩҮЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ШіЫҢЪҜЩҶШ§Щ„ ЩҮШ§ ШўШІШ§Шұ ШҜЩҮЩҶШҜЩҮ Ш§ШіШӘ.


ШіЩ„ШЁ Щ…ШіШҰЩҲЩ„ЫҢШӘ:
Ш§ЫҢЩҶ ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҮ Ъ©Ш§Щ…Щ„Ш§ЩӢ ЫҢЪ© Ш§Ш«Шұ ШҜШ§ШіШӘШ§ЩҶЫҢ ЩҲ Щ…ШӯШөЩҲЩ„ ШӘШ®ЫҢЩ„ Ш§ШіШӘ. ШӘЩ…Ш§Щ… ЩҲЩӮШ§ЫҢШ№ ШҢ ЩҲЩӮШ§ЫҢШ№ ШҢ ШҙШ®ШөЫҢШӘ ЩҮШ§ ЩҲ ШҜШ§ШіШӘШ§ЩҶ ЩҮЩ…ЩҮ ШЁШұЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҮ ЩҮШ§ Ъ©Ш§Щ…Щ„Ш§ЩӢ ШіШ§Ш®ШӘЪҜЫҢ Ш§ШіШӘ ЩҲ ЩҮЫҢЪҶ ШҙШЁШ§ЩҮШӘЫҢ ШЁЩҮ ШҙШ®Шө ШІЩҶШҜЩҮ ЫҢШ§ Щ…ШұШҜЩҮ ЩҶШҜШ§ШұШҜ.

Щ…ШҙШӘШұЪ© ШҙШҜЩҶ ШҜШұ ШЁЫҢШҙШӘШұ ШҜШ§ШіШӘШ§ЩҶ ЩҮШ§ЫҢ Ш¬ЩҶШ§ЫҢЫҢ в–ә tinyurl.com/yqr4dckv

Crime Patrol - Niana Bhabhi - Full Episode | Crime Stories | аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨҮаӨ® аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘӢаӨ°аҘҖаӨңаӨј | 

Presented by: DMR Entertainment
Story: Rupali Rawat
DOP: Ramesh Yadav
Makeup and Hair: Sazid Shaikh and Shradha
Sound Recordist: Manoj Gupta
Costume Stylist: Rupali Rawat
Background Music: Sunil Darnal
Editor: Rajiv Kumar Chanai
Creative Director: Arya Rawat
Director: Yatindra Rawat
Producer: Dharmanand Joshi, Raghu


Relive the best episodes of your favorite crime-thriller show, Crime Patrol, Crime Series, Crime Stories, Crime Alert, Crime TIme

About the show:
--------------------------
Crimes that tell us, we need to be careful, we need to be watchful. Crimes that tell us lives could have been saved. Every crime we hear of, either warns us to be careful or scares us, it could happen to us. Every crime ignites a feeling, 'It should not have happened'. Would knowing the 'Why' behind a crime, help in stopping a crime from happening?' I donвҖҷt like the way he looks at me', 'I donвҖҷt like the way he/she is behaving', 'I think he/she is out of his/her mind', 'I think he/she has gone crazy'. That gaze, that quirky smile, that persistent stare which unnerves. It is difficult to understand the intentions but the hints are there. In a house a husband and wife argue, fight. A vessel comes flying, a glass breaks. The husband is angry and the wife is upset. That hatred, that ego. The distance that keeps growing. It is difficult to comprehend the damage, but the cracks are there. FeelingsвҖҰ expressions. Misunderstood, unresolved callings of the heart. The cracks are there. Too wide to be missed. Yet when the heart takes over the mind, the outcome is a mindless tragedy. Crime Patrol- Dastak will attempt to look at the signs, the signals that are always there before these mindless crimes are committed. Instincts/Feelings/Signals that so often tell us that not everything is normal. Maybe, that signal/feeling/instinct is just not enough to believe it could result in a crime. Unfortunately, after the crime is committed, those same signals come haunting.


Disclaimer:
This program is entirely a work of fiction and a product of imagination. All events, incidences, characters and story of all the program are entirely fictitious and bear no resemblance to any person living or dead.

snippet.title: Main Agar Chup Hoon - Episode 88 Teaser - 16th February 2021 - HAR PAL GEO
snippet.description:
Main Agar Chup Hoon - Episode 88 Teaser - 16th February 2021 - HAR PAL GEO

Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Main Agar Chup Hoon is a story of a young and self-reliant girl named Emaan who after the death of her father has lived at her uncleвҖҷs house along with her mother and sister, Sehrish.
With lots of hopes and love for her cousin Zeeshan, Emaan gets married however soon after marriage Zeeshan moves abroad and sends her divorce papers. Heartbroken, Emaan gathers herself and takes the responsibility of providing livelihood to her and ZeeshanвҖҷs family. Despite ZeeshanвҖҷs insensitive and unjust behavior, Emaan continues to respect and care for ZeeshanвҖҷs family considering that they are her elders as well.
Things take an unexpected turn when Zeeshan returns from abroad in hopes to reconcile her relationship with Emaan however she is already committed to Ahad. Will ZeeshanвҖҷs return become a reason for EmaanвҖҷs hardships and will Sehrish further disrupt EmaanвҖҷs marital life by marrying Zeeshan? Will misunderstandings and differences between Ahad and Emaan ever resolve?

Written By: Erum Wasi & Saima Wasi
Directed By: Ali Akbar
Produced By: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment

Cast :

Fatima Effendi As Emaan
Adeel Chaudary As Ahad
Hammad Farooqui As Zeeshan
Sehrish Khan As Sehrish

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - Ep 3103  - Full Episode - 16th February, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chasmah Episodes: https://youtube.com/channel/UC54_ux4BnaJwkVFn5M391XQ?sub_confirmation=1

Episode 3103: 
-----------------------
Sodhi takes Bhide to make him meet his friends who will be posing as their bodyguards. The duo meets up with Jethalal and Bagha to discuss the further plan of action. Watch the full episode.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Oondha Chashma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in ""Gokuldham Co-operative Society"" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around Jethalal (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Tarak Mehta (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. Jethalal finds a friend and philosopher in Tarak Mehta and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalal's family includes his simpleton wife Daya Ben (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son Tapu (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members residing in the Gokuldham Society. They have often warned Jethalal to reform Tapu or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by

snippet.title: Main Agar Chup Hoon - Episode 87 Teaser - 15th February 2021 - HAR PAL GEO
snippet.description:
Main Agar Chup Hoon - Episode 87 Teaser - 15th February 2021 - HAR PAL GEO

Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Main Agar Chup Hoon is a story of a young and self-reliant girl named Emaan who after the death of her father has lived at her uncleвҖҷs house along with her mother and sister, Sehrish.
With lots of hopes and love for her cousin Zeeshan, Emaan gets married however soon after marriage Zeeshan moves abroad and sends her divorce papers. Heartbroken, Emaan gathers herself and takes the responsibility of providing livelihood to her and ZeeshanвҖҷs family. Despite ZeeshanвҖҷs insensitive and unjust behavior, Emaan continues to respect and care for ZeeshanвҖҷs family considering that they are her elders as well.
Things take an unexpected turn when Zeeshan returns from abroad in hopes to reconcile her relationship with Emaan however she is already committed to Ahad. Will ZeeshanвҖҷs return become a reason for EmaanвҖҷs hardships and will Sehrish further disrupt EmaanвҖҷs marital life by marrying Zeeshan? Will misunderstandings and differences between Ahad and Emaan ever resolve?

Written By: Erum Wasi & Saima Wasi
Directed By: Ali Akbar
Produced By: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment

Cast :

Fatima Effendi As Emaan
Adeel Chaudary As Ahad
Hammad Farooqui As Zeeshan
Sehrish Khan As Sehrish
Sehrish Khan As Sehrish
Ayesha Gul As Shameem
Sajida Saeed As Bi Jan
Sajeer Uddin As Mubashir
Farhan Ali Agha As Alam
Yasir Shoro As Atif
Samiah Baksh As Shifa
Sami Khan As Zain
Kanwal Khan As Zara
Hasan Shah As Tabeer
Yasir Alam As Afnan


#MainAgarChupHoonEP87Teaser
#HARPALGEO

аӨӘаӨҝаӨӣаӨІаҘҮ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҖаӨ¬ 70 аӨҰаӨҝаӨЁаҘӢаӨӮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ•аӨҝаӨёаӨҫаӨЁ аӨҶаӨӮаӨҰаҘӢаӨІаӨЁ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮаӨӮаӨҰаҘҚаӨ° аӨ¬аӨЁаҘҮ аӨҰаӨҝаӨІаҘҚаӨІаҘҖ аӨёаҘҮ аӨёаӨҹаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҖаӨЁаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ¬аҘүаӨ°аҘҚаӨЎаӨ°аҘӢаӨӮ аӨӘаӨ° аӨӘаӨҝаӨӣаӨІаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҒаӨӣ аӨҰаӨҝаӨЁаҘӢаӨӮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҒаӨІаӨҝаӨё аӨҰаҘҚаӨөаӨҫаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ¬аӨўаӨјаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ—аӨҲ аӨ¬аҘҲаӨ°аӨҝаӨ•аҘҮаӨЎаӨҝаӨӮаӨ— аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аӨЈ аӨ•аӨҝаӨёаӨҫаӨЁаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨӘаӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ, аӨ¶аҘҢаӨҡаӨҫаӨІаӨҜ аӨёаҘҮ аӨІаҘҮаӨ•аӨ° аӨёаӨ«аӨҫаӨҲ аӨӨаӨ• аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҰаӨҝаӨ•аҘҚаӨ•аӨӨаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨ®аӨЁаӨҫ аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаӨҫ аӨӘаӨЎаӨј аӨ°аӨ№аӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ.
аӨ¬аӨӨаӨҫ аӨҰаҘҮаӨӮ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨңаӨ№аӨҫаӨӮ аӨёаӨҝаӨӮаӨҳаҘӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨҹаӨҝаӨ•аӨ°аҘҖ аӨ§аӨ°аӨЁаӨҫ аӨёаҘҚаӨҘаӨІ аӨ№аӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаӨЈаӨҫ аӨ¬аҘүаӨ°аҘҚаӨЎаӨ° аӨ•аҘҖ аӨӨаӨ°аӨ« аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ, аӨөаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨ—аӨҫаӨңаҘҖаӨӘаҘҒаӨ°, аӨүаӨӨаҘҚаӨӨаӨ° аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨӨаӨ°аӨ« аӨ№аҘҲ.

snippet.title: Baalveer Returns - Ep 298 - Full Episode - 11th February, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of Baalveer Returns: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7Yx-rSymwv5NSIsaQ0RwDK_

Episode 298: Kids Are Scared With Mahabali
---------------------------------------
Kids are scared with Mahabali. everyone has hidden in the library but Vivan is missing. Mahabali is looking for a secret map and he finds the kids, Sir tries to stop Mahabali but Mahabali throws him away. watch the full episode on SonyLiv.

About Baalveer Returns:
---------------------------------------
After Pari-lok, the home of benevolent fairies was destroyed by a mighty evil, Timnasa. Baalveer takes shelter in Veer-lok along with a few Paris who had survived the massacre. There, under the guidance of the wise old white lion Shaurya, Baalveer and Pari's are instructed to find the successor of Baalveer at the earliest, since he was immensely injured during the war and will need to team up a new Baalveer to further fight the battle with evil. This search for the next Baalveer takes them to earth, where they discover Vivan, who lives in an old society of Mumbai. He is the naughtiest kid, an ardent fan of Salman Khan, and a non-believer of Baalveer and his powers. This adds to the misery of Baalveer because unfortunately, this undisciplined, non-believer kid is the real successor of Baalveer. What follows is the challenging journey of Baalveer and his team to make Vivaan the next Baalveer with some eccentric characters, childish games and lots of magic on earth and the respective loks, while the imminent threat of Timnasa and the mystery behind her origin continues to play a part.

#baalveerreturns #baalveer

snippet.title: Akshay Kumar New Full Action Hindi Movies 2021
snippet.description:
@T-Series 
#Akahykumarmovies #Fullmovies #hindimovies

SUBSCRIBER'S REQUEST YOU TO WATCH OUR CHANNEL-PLEASE DO CLICK ON THE ADVERTISEMENTS SO WE CAN MAKE MORE INTRERSTING VIDEOS FOR YOU & ENTERTAIN YOU MORE.
ALSO DO SUBSCRIBE TO OUR CHANNEL.
Bollywood is the name given to the Mumbai-based Hindi-language film industry in India. When combined with other Indian film industries (Tamil, Telugu, Bengali, Malayalam, Kannada), it is considered to be the largest in the world in terms of number of films produced, and maybe also the number of tickets sold. The term Bollywood was created by conflating Bombay (the city now called Mumbai) and Hollywood (the famous center of the United States film industry).
Bollywood films are usually musicals. Few movies are made without at least one song-and-dance number. Indian audiences expect full value for their money; they want songs and dances, love interest, comedy and dare-devil thrills, all mixed up in a three hour long extravaganza with intermission. Such movies are called masala movies, after the spice mixture masala. Like masala, these movies have everything. Aamir Khan, Abhay Deol, Abhishek Bachchan, Akshay Kumar, Anil Kapoor, Amitabh Bachchan, Bobby Deol, Dev Anand, 
Dilip Kumar, Emraan Hashmi, Farhan Akhtar, Govinda, Hrithik Roshan, Himesh Reshammiya, Imran Khan, Irrfan Khan, John Abraham, Johnny Lever, Kamal Haasan, Karan Johar, Kishore Kumar, Manoj Kumar, Naseeruddin Shah, Nana Patekar, Pankaj Kapoor, Prabhu Deva Sundaram, Raj Kapoor, Rajesh Khanna, Salman Khan, Sanjay Dutt, Shahid Kapoor, Shahrukh Khan, Sunny Deol,Priyanka Chopra, Rani Mukherji, Katrina Kaif, Parineeti chopra, sonakshi sinha, Aishwarya Rai, Amrita Rao, Ayesha Takia, Bipasha Basu , Celina Jetley,  Deepika Padukone, Diana Hayden,Diya Mirza, Geeta Basra, Gul Panag,  Juhi Chawla, Kajol Mukherjee , Kangana Ranaut, Kareena Kapoor , Karisma Kapoor , Lisa Ray, Madhuri Dixitm,  Mugdha Godse, neetu Chandra, Preity Zinta , Raveena Tandon, Samira Reddy,  Sherlyn Chopra, Shriya Saran,Sonam Kapoor , Tabu, Vidya Balan,  Yana Gupta

snippet.description:

Click here to watch Most Viewed clips:

Tanya, a little girl is found at the Delhi airport with a boarding pass of Mumbai. Believing that the girl came from Mumbai, the airport authorities decided to send her back with an air hostess. But upon reaching Mumbai, Tanya goes missing yet again

About CID: 
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. the team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues.

#cid
#crime

Utri Hai Aj Fatima Zehra Zameen Per

Zahra Yahin Hain Tu Bhi Thehar Jaa Zameen Per

Khud Ake Degi Mout Suna Ran Ko Zindagi
Han Zahra Bicha Rahi Hai Musalla Zameen Per

Aray Ik Bhoj Hai Yeh Dushman e Zehra Zameen Per

Parhiye Jo Syeda Ka Qasida Zameen Per

Taqseem Karti Fatima Zahra Ager Fidak

Milta Nahi Batool Ka Saaya Zameen Per

snippet.title: Best Of CID | аӨёаҘҖаӨҶаӨҲаӨЎаҘҖ |  A Bizarre Case | Full Episode
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: https://www.youtube.com/user/sonypalindia?sub_confirmation=1

A joker enters the hospital as he cries out that he's going to die at 10.45 which is ten minutes from now. No one believes him as he storms into an operating theater where surgery is already going on, he cries out for the emergency surgery as he knows his precise time of death. Now the ten minutes elapse amidst chaos and the joker dies precisely at the same moment. CID investigates the bizarre case as they try to make the sense of how can a man predict his own death.

About CID: 
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. the team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. snippet.title: LADY COBRA | New Hollywood Hindi Dubbed Action Movie | #Latest Released Hindi Dubbed Movie 2021
snippet.description:
Summaries:
Chanachol, recently returned to Thailand after living overseas, signs up for a tour to get back in touch with Thai culture, and finds himself attracted to the tour guide, Mekhala. There are several problems with the relationship: Chanachol is married, with family, and Mekhala has a mysterious, symbiotic relationship with a deadly cobra, and many of her previous suitors have ended up dead.
Director: M.L. Pundhevanop Dhewakul
Stars: Shahkrit Yamnarm, Karnpitchar Ketmanee, Jiravich Pongpaijit

snippet.title: 2021Ajith Kumar Hindi Dubbed Blockbuster Action Movie Full HD 1080p | Meera Jasmine,Adithya Menon
snippet.description:
Movie: Anjaneya 
Starring: Ajith Kumar, Meera Jasmine, Raghuvaran, Jaya Prakash Reddy, Adithya Menon, Ramesh Khanna, Manivannan, Girish Karnad, Mansoor Ali Khan, Seetha
Director: N. Maharajan
Producer: S. S. Chakravarthy
 




Ajith, having been selected as an IPS officer awaits his posting as an Assistant Commissioner of Police. He romances with Meera Jasmine, who also falls in love with him. But his inability to remain silent in the face of injustice makes him beat up Г”FefsiГ• Vijayan, a local rowdy and this puts his posting in jeopardy. He overcomes it to become the AC and stands up to Jaiprakash Reddy, who seems to have both the police and the politicians in his pocket. How he succeeds amidst all obstacles in life is the rest of the movie.

Ajith, having been selected as an IPS officer awaits his posting as an Assistant Commissioner of Police. He romances with Meera Jasmine, who also falls in love with him. But his inability to remain silent in the face of injustice makes him beat up Г”FefsiГ• Vijayan, a local rowdy and this puts his posting in jeopardy. He overcomes it to become the AC and stands up to Jaiprakash Reddy, who seems to have both the police and the politicians in his pocket. How he succeeds amidst all obstacles in life is the rest of the movie.

snippet.title: The Girl On The Train | Official Trailer | Parineeti Chopra, Aditi Rao Hydari & Kirti Kulhari
snippet.description:
The journey has begun and there's no turning back. Are you in?

A bright city, a dull morning and a curious girl on the train. When a voyeuristic divorcee fixates on the lives of a perfect couple from afar, she soon gets embroiled in a murder mystery that unfolds revealing truths about her own life. Get on board a thrilling experience with Parineeti Chopra, Aditi Rao Hydari, Kirti Kulhari and Avinash Tiwary. Catch Ribhu Dasgupta's The Girl On The Train on 26th February, only on Netflix.

Official Teaser: https://youtu.be/3iH0YehfMB0

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong вҖ“ Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
В 
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, вҖңGodzilla vs. Kong,вҖқ the next epic adventure in LegendaryвҖҷs cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in вҖңGodzilla vs. KongвҖқ as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titansвҖ”instigated by unseen forcesвҖ”is only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander SkarsgГҘrd (вҖңBig Little Lies,вҖқ вҖңThe Little Drummer GirlвҖқ), Millie Bobby Brown (вҖңStranger ThingsвҖқ), Rebecca Hall (вҖңChristine,вҖқ вҖңProfessor Marston and the Wonder WomenвҖқ), Brian Tyree Henry (вҖңJoker,вҖқ вҖңSpider-Man: Into the Spider-VerseвҖқ), Shun Oguri (вҖңWeathering with YouвҖқ), Eiza GonzГЎlez (вҖңFast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & ShawвҖқ), Julian Dennison (вҖңDeadpool 2вҖқ), with Kyle Chandler (вҖңGodzilla: King of the MonstersвҖқ) and DemiГЎn Bichir (вҖңThe Nun,вҖқ вҖңThe Hateful EightвҖқ).
Wingard (вҖңThe Guest,вҖқ вҖңYouвҖҷre NextвҖқ) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (вҖңThor: RagnarokвҖқ) and Max Borenstein (вҖңGodzilla: King of the Monsters,вҖқ вҖңKong: Skull IslandвҖқ), story by Terry Rossio (вҖңPirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No TalesвҖқ) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (вҖңGodzilla: King of the MonstersвҖқ), based on the character вҖңGodzillaвҖқ owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The directorвҖҷs behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (вҖңThe Mummy,вҖқ вҖңWorld War ZвҖқ), production designers Owen Paterson (вҖңJumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,вҖқ вҖңGodzillaвҖқ) and Thomas S. Hammock (вҖңBlair WitchвҖқ), editor Josh Schaeffer (вҖңGodzilla: King of the MonstersвҖқ), costume designer Ann Foley (вҖңSkyscraperвҖқ) and visual effects supervisor John вҖңDJвҖқ DesJardin (upcoming вҖңZack SnyderвҖҷs Justice LeagueвҖқ).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, вҖңGodzilla vs. Kong.вҖқ  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

snippet.title: CHOTU DADA 1,2 ka 4 | аӨӣаҘӢаӨҹаҘӮ аӨҰаӨҫаӨҰаӨҫ 1,2 аӨ•аӨҫ 4 | Khandesh Hindi Comedy | Chotu Dada Comedy Video
snippet.description:
аӨӣаҘӢаӨҹаҘӮ аӨҰаӨҫаӨҰаӨҫ аӨӘаӨ№аҘҒаӨӮаӨҡ аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨӯаӨҫаӨӯаҘҖ аӨңаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨӘаӨҫаӨё, аӨӯаӨҫаӨӯаҘҖ аӨңаҘҖ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№аӨҝаӨҸ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҖ аӨӣаҘӢаӨҹаҘҖ аӨ¬аӨ№аӨЁ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨҸаӨ• аӨІаҘңаӨ•аӨҫ, аӨӣаҘӢаӨҹаҘӮ аӨҰаӨҫаӨҰаӨҫ аӨӘаӨ№аҘҮаӨІаӨөаӨҫаӨЁ аӨ”аӨ° аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ аӨӘаӨ№аҘҒаӨӮаӨҡ аӨ—аӨҸ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ¶аӨҫаӨҰаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ , аӨӨаҘӢ аӨ«аӨҝаӨ° аӨ•аӨҝаӨё аӨІаҘңаӨ•аҘҮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨӘаӨёаӨӮаӨҰ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨ—аҘҖ аӨӯаӨҫаӨӯаҘҖ аӨңаҘҖ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҖ аӨӣаҘӢаӨҹаҘҖ аӨ¬аӨ№аӨЁ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ, аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨҝаӨҜаҘҮ аӨӣаҘӢаӨҹаҘӮ аӨҰаӨҫаӨҰаӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҮаӨё аӨ•аҘүаӨ®аҘҮаӨЎаҘҖ аӨёаҘҮ аӨӯаӨ°аӨӘаҘӮаӨ° аӨөаӨҝаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ.


Email:- khandesimovies@gmail.com  


#ChotukiDulhaniya #Bhabiji #ChotuDadaComedy

snippet.description:
Starring: Nav Bajwa, Aman Singh Deep, Payal Rajput and Karamjit Anmol 

Director - Nav Bajwa
Cinematography - Gifty Kang
Edited by - Puneet ASP

The soundtrack of the film by Money Aujla and score by Gurcharan Singh, lyrics are by Sidhu Moosewala and Maninder Kailey. The songs are sung by Hardy Sandhu, Akhil, Dilpreet Dhillon, Harshdeep, Kamal Khan, Naman Hanjra, Masha Ali and Sufi Sparrow. 


Synopsis - Ishqaa is the story of Rajveer, Seerat and Virat's love triangle, in which Rajveer is the one suffering from split personality disorder. How his character creates unwanted trouble for the couple Virat-Seerat, is what this film offers for the audiences.
